---
title: "Cardinal John Henry Newman"
---

## Cardinal John Henry Newman

**Dates:** (1801-1890)

### Description

theologian

### Biography

He became a Roman Catholic on 9 October 1845, causing consternation to Keble and many of his Anglican friends. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from [1891]
- Letter from [1891]
- Letter from Aug 6th [1877]
- Letter from August 6. [1869]
- Letter from April 10th [1867]
- Letter from March 25th 1867
- Letter from April 5. 1866.
- Letter from [About 1865]
- Letter from October 3. [1857]
- Letter from Oct 14th [1852]
- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Sept 30th 1844

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
